info.title: SiteBay
info.description: Manage WordPress sites on SiteBay: create and delete sites, manage files, run WP-CLI shell commands, manage DNS, interact with the WordPress REST API via wp-proxy, manage Shopify stores via shopify-proxy, and query analytics via posthog-proxy.

patch.description: Update a store's details. MCP Enabled.

get.description: Get Linked Shopify Store. MCP Enabled.
Get stores you have connected to your user account from Shopify Link. MCP Enabled.
Retrieve data about users who have signed up using your links. MCP Enabled.
Get the data for your linked GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket repositories. MCP Enabled.

200.description: Details of your linked GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket repositories

schema.title: Response Get Linked Git Repos For User F Api V1 Account Git Repos Get

post.summary: Buy a team through stripe checkout
post.description: Generate a stripe checkout URL. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Create Checkout Session F Api V1 Create Checkout Session Post

post.description: Proxies requests to a myshopify admin API. Use this to manage Shopify products, orders, themes, and other resources on a connected store. MCP Enabled.

200.description: JSON response from the Shopify Admin API

post.description: Proxies requests to the WordPress REST API (wp-json/wp/v2) for a site you own. Use this to create/read/update/delete posts, pages, media, users, and other WordPress resources. Authentication is handled automatically. MCP Enabled.

200.description: JSON response from the WordPress REST API

post.description: Proxies requests to the PostHog analytics API for a team you belong to. Use this to query insights, list events, manage dashboards, and access site analytics. The path must include a project ID (e.g. /api/projects/6/insights). MCP Enabled.

200.description: JSON response from the PostHog API

post.description: Proxies requests to the Grafana API for a team you belong to. Use this to query dashboards, datasources, and Loki log data. MCP Enabled.

200.description: JSON response from the Grafana API

get.description: Returns your account's linked Git Repos. MCP Enabled.
Get details about all of your live sites. MCP Enabled.

post.description: Create a new site by providing your domain and your site's WordPress details. If you don't include a region_name, your default region will be used. MCP Enabled.

get.description: Get details about your live site. MCP Enabled.

patch.description: Update a site's details. MCP Enabled.

delete.description: This permanently deletes your site, and its stage site if one exists. MCP Enabled.

get.summary: Get backups to create PIT Restore
get.description: Give a restore point to get your closest minutely backup details. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Get Backup Commits F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Pit Restore Commits Get

get.description: Get a list of wp-content files at a point in time. MCP Enabled.

post.description: Generate signed download URLs for specific backup files. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Get Download Urls F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Get Download Urls Post

get.description: Get all the results of a site's restores to a previous point in time. MCP Enabled.

post.description: Restore your site to a previous point in time, down to the minute. MCP Enabled.

get.description: Get the results of a site's restore to a previous point in time. MCP Enabled.

post.description: Preview what would be restored without actually restoring. MCP Enabled.

post.summary: Navigate browser to a path on the site
post.description: Navigate the site's browser context to a given path. Auto-logs in on first use. MCP Enabled.

post.summary: Take a screenshot of the site
post.description: Returns a base64-encoded PNG screenshot of the current page. MCP Enabled.

post.summary: Click an element on the site
post.description: Click an element by CSS selector in the site's browser context. MCP Enabled.

post.summary: Fill a form field on the site
post.description: Fill a form field by CSS selector. MCP Enabled.
Execute JavaScript in the site's browser context and return the result. MCP Enabled.

post.summary: Get text content of an element
post.description: Get visible text content of a CSS-selected element (default: body). MCP Enabled.

post.summary: Generate a WordPress admin auth cookie for the site
post.description: Generates a short-lived WordPress admin authentication cookie via WP-CLI. Returns { name, value, domain } so the agent can inject it into a headless browser context to access /wp-admin/ pages without going through the login flow. MCP Enabled.

get.description: Get DNS records for nameserver configured sites. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Get Dns Records F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Dns Get

post.description: Create Cloudflare DNS record. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Create Dns Record F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Dns Post
Response Delete Dns Record F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Dns  Dns Id  Delete

get.description: Get all external paths for site. MCP Enabled.

post.description: Create external path. MCP Enabled.
Read file contents from wp-content/. Supports line ranges. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Read File F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Wpfile Read Post

post.description: Edit a file using search/replace blocks. Supports dry_run to preview diff. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Edit File F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Wpfile Edit Post

post.summary: Read then edit a WordPress file
post.description: Atomically read a file and apply edits. Returns the original content alongside the edit result. Supports dry_run. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Read And Edit File F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Wpfile Read And Edit Post

post.description: Get a directory tree of wp-content/ with file sizes. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response File Tree F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Wpfile Tree Post

post.description: Apply search/replace edits to multiple files in one request. All-or-nothing: if any edit fails, all changes are rolled back. Supports dry_run. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Multi Edit Files F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Wpfile Multi Edit Post

post.description: Edit a file in your wp-content folder. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Diff Edit F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Wpfile Diff Edit Post

delete.description: Unlink the git repository from this site. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Unlink Git F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Git Delete

get.description: Get container logs for debugging. MCP Enabled.

parameters.name: lines

schema.description: Number of log lines to retrieve
schema.title: Lines

parameters.description: Number of log lines to retrieve

schema.title: Response Get Container Logs F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Logs  Container Name  Get

get.description: Get WordPress/git-sync logs. MCP Enabled.

parameters.name: lines

schema.description: Number of log lines to retrieve
schema.title: Lines

parameters.description: Number of log lines to retrieve

parameters.name: level

schema.description: Log level filter (error, warning, info, debug)
schema.title: Level

parameters.description: Log level filter (error, warning, info, debug)

schema.title: Response Get Site Logs F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Logs Get

post.description: Send a bash shell command to your site, such as a WP-CLI command. MCP Enabled.

get.description: Get Cloudflare tools info and current zone settings. MCP Enabled.

patch.description: Toggle one or more Cloudflare performance/security settings. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Update Cf Settings F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Cf Settings Patch

post.description: Purge all cached content for the site. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Clear Cache F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Clear Cache Post

get.description: Re-verify whether the domain's nameservers point to SiteBay. Used by the NS setup wizard to poll for propagation. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Check Ns Status F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Ns Status Get

post.description: Enable or disable rate-limiting on /wp-login.php to prevent brute-force attacks. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Toggle Waf Login Protection F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Waf Login Protection Post

post.description: Attach a custom domain (e.g. shop.theirclient.com) to this site via Cloudflare for SaaS. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Add Custom Hostname F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Custom Hostname Post

get.description: List all custom hostnames attached to this site with DCV/SSL status. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response List Site Custom Hostnames F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Custom Hostname Get

delete.description: Remove a custom hostname from this site. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Remove Custom Hostname F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Custom Hostname  Hostname Id  Delete

get.description: Get the staging site for this live site, if one exists. MCP Enabled.

post.description: Create a staging site. MCP Enabled.

delete.description: Delete a staging site. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Delete Staging Site F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Stage Delete

post.description: Create a named checkpoint with an auto-captured screenshot. MCP Enabled.

get.description: List all checkpoints for a site, newest first. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response List Checkpoints F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Checkpoints Get

get.description: Get details of a specific checkpoint. MCP Enabled.

delete.description: Delete checkpoint metadata. The underlying backup is not affected. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Delete Checkpoint F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Checkpoints  Checkpoint Id  Delete

post.description: Restore the site to the state at this checkpoint using PIT restore. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Restore Checkpoint F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Checkpoints  Checkpoint Id  Restore Post

get.description: Recent dolt commits for this site's database. Shows what tables changed and when. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Dolt Log F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Dolt Log Get

get.description: Show what changed in the database between two commits. If only `from_commit` is given, diffs to HEAD. If neither is given, diffs the last commit vs HEAD (most recent changes). MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Dolt Diff F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Dolt Diff Get

get.description: Returns a plain-English summary of what changed in the database. Ideal for the agent to speak back to the user before publishing. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Dolt Diff Summary F Api V1 Site  Fqdn  Dolt Diff Summary Get

get.description: Get details about all of your owned and member teams. MCP Enabled.
Read a Shopify theme asset by key. Returns normalized Shopify file body metadata. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Read Asset F Api V1 Shopify  Shop Name  Theme  Theme Id  Asset Get

post.description: Edit a Shopify theme asset using WordPress-style search/replace blocks. Supports dry_run. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Edit Asset F Api V1 Shopify  Shop Name  Theme  Theme Id  Asset Edit Post

post.description: Edit multiple Shopify theme assets using WordPress-style search/replace blocks. Supports dry_run and rollback reporting. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Multi Edit Assets F Api V1 Shopify  Shop Name  Theme  Theme Id  Assets Multi Edit Post

post.description: Duplicate a Shopify theme to create a rollback checkpoint. MCP Enabled.

schema.title: Response Duplicate Theme F Api V1 Shopify  Shop Name  Theme  Theme Id  Duplicate Post

get.description: Returns a list of ready-made ready_made_site sites. MCP Enabled.

ShellCommandRequest.description: Request model for shell command execution.

examples.query_params_json: {"title":"Meet Spot: A Lovable Pup","content":"Spot is an adorable, energetic dog who loves to play fetch and run in the park. Every day is an adventure with Spot, from chasing butterflies to exploring new trails. His bright eyes and wagging tail bring joy to everyone he meets."}
